summary: Project contains multiple cognitive/brain games including a Stroop Effect game (30 second timer, scoring, levels) and a new Memory Test game being added. Memory Test shows 10 objects for 10 seconds, then a search bar appears with 25 seconds to recall all objects.
architectural_notes: Memory Test game must be added below all existing games on the page
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Memory test game icon showing a brain with magnifying glass or eye symbol, flat illustration style matching the app's purple/blue theme (memory-test-icon.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Create a useMemoryTest custom React hook that manages the Memory Test game logic: displays 10 everyday objects (with emoji + text) for 10 seconds, then hides them and starts a 25-second countdown, accepts user-typed object names one at a time via Enter key, tracks how many of the 10 objects have been correctly recalled, and determines win (all 10 recalled before time runs out) or loss (timer reaches zero).

Create a MemoryTestGame page at a new route (e.g., /memory-test) that renders the Memory Test game UI: shows a grid of 10 object cards (emoji + label) during the memorize phase with a 10-second countdown, then hides the objects and shows a search/input bar with a 25-second timer during the recall phase, displays a list of already-recalled objects, and shows a win/loss result screen on completion. Save the result to the backend using the useCompleteLevel mutation hook on game end.

Register the /memory-test route in App.tsx and add the Memory Test game card to the HomePage below all existing game cards, using a consistent GameCard component with the game's title 'Memory Test', a short description, and an appropriate icon.

Add a difficulty configuration entry for 'memoryTest' in difficultyConfig.ts with appropriate settings across 5 levels (e.g., varying the number of objects shown, or time limits in future levels), defaulting to 10 objects, 10-second memorize phase, and 25-second recall phase at level 1.

new_feature_requests.summary: Memory Test game: show 10 objects for 10 seconds, then search bar for 25 seconds to recall all objects, win if all 10 correct
Add a new 'Memory Test' game type to the backend GameType variant and support saving its game state and high scores alongside existing game types.
